## Summary
<!-- One precise line describing what this PR does -->

## Requirement Reference
- **REQ-ID**: [e.g., REQ-CAL-003]
- **SRS Section**: [e.g., §3.2 — Calibration]
- **Issue**: #[number]

## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Compliance / Process

## Changes
- [ ] New files added
- [ ] Existing files modified
- [ ] Tests added/updated

## Living Documentation Updated
<!-- Every applicable box must be checked for the PR to be mergeable -->
- [ ] `docs/SOFTWARE_REQUIREMENTS.md` updated (if new/changed requirement)
- [ ] `docs/SOFTWARE_DESIGN.md` updated (if architecture changed)
- [ ] `docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md` updated (Req → Code → Test)
- [ ] `docs/CALIBRATION_GUIDE.md` updated (if calibration feature changed)
- [ ] `docs/RISK_ANALYSIS.md` updated (if new risk identified)
- [ ] `docs/CHANGE_LOG.md` updated

## Testing
- [ ] All unit tests pass: `dotnet test`
- [ ] Determinism test passes (required if tracking/physics code changed)
- [ ] Calibration accuracy test passes, RMS < threshold (if calibration changed)
- [ ] Static analysis clean: zero warnings, zero SonarAnalyzer issues
- [ ] Manual verification performed:
  <!-- Describe exact steps used to verify the change -->

## Risk Assessment
- [ ] No new risk introduced
- [ ] Risk updated — RSK-ID: ___ Description: ___

## Screenshots / Recordings
<!-- Required for any UI change. Attach before/after screenshots or a screen recording. -->
